search.query: index=greenhouse sourcetype="greenhouse:log" | rex field=_raw "-\s(?<temp_f>\d+(?:\.\d+)?)°F\s(?<rh>\d+(?:\.\d+)?)%" | eval temp_f=tonumber(temp_f), rh=tonumber(rh) | eval temp_c=(temp_f-32)*5/9 | eval svp=0.6108*exp((17.27*temp_c)/(temp_c+237.3)) | eval vpd=(1-rh/100)*svp | eval dewpoint_c=(243.04*(log(rh/100)+((17.625*temp_c)/(243.04+temp_c))))/(17.625-log(rh/100)-((17.625*temp_c)/(243.04+temp_c))) | eval dewpoint_f=(dewpoint_c*9/5)+32 | eval temp_f=round(temp_f,1), rh=round(rh,1), vpd=round(vpd,2), dewpoint_f=round(dewpoint_f,1)

index=greenhouse sourcetype="greenhouse:log" earliest=@d | rex field=_raw "-\s(?<temp_f>\d+(?:\.\d+)?)°F\s(?<rh>\d+(?:\.\d+)?)%" | eval temp_f=tonumber(temp_f), rh=tonumber(rh) | eval temp_c=(temp_f-32)*5/9 | eval svp=0.6108*exp((17.27*temp_c)/(temp_c+237.3)) | eval vpd=(1-rh/100)*svp | eval temp_f=round(temp_f,1), rh=round(rh,1), vpd=round(vpd,2)

index=greenhouse sourcetype="greenhouse:api:json" | eval outdoor_temp_f=tonumber(weather_temp_f) | eval outdoor_feelslike_f=tonumber(weather_feelslike_f) | eval outdoor_humidity=tonumber(weather_humidity) | eval outdoor_wind_mph=tonumber(weather_wind_mph) | eval outdoor_uv=tonumber(weather_uv_index) | eval outdoor_pressure_in=tonumber(weather_pressure_in) | eval outdoor_cloudcover=tonumber(weather_cloudcover)

index=greenhouse sourcetype="greenhouse:log" | rex field=_raw "-\s(?<temp_f>\d+(?:\.\d+)?)°F\s(?<rh>\d+(?:\.\d+)?)%" | eval greenhouse_temp_f=tonumber(temp_f), greenhouse_rh=tonumber(rh) | bin _time span=15m | stats avg(greenhouse_temp_f) as greenhouse_temp avg(greenhouse_rh) as greenhouse_rh by _time | appendcols [ search index=greenhouse sourcetype="greenhouse:api:json" | bin _time span=15m | stats avg(weather_temp_f) as outdoor_temp avg(weather_humidity) as outdoor_rh by _time ] | eval temp_delta=round(greenhouse_temp-outdoor_temp,2) | eval rh_delta=round(greenhouse_rh-outdoor_rh,2)
| stats latest(temp_f) as value | fields value
| stats latest(rh) as value | fields value
| stats latest(vpd) as value | fields value
| stats latest(dewpoint_f) as value | fields value
index=greenhouse sourcetype="greenhouse:log" | stats latest(_time) as last_seen | eval value=round((now()-last_seen)/60,1) | fields value
| stats latest(temp_delta) as value | fields value
| stats latest(temp_f) as temp | eval value=case( temp<45,"LOW TEMP ALERT", temp>95,"HIGH TEMP ALERT", true(),"NORMAL" ) | table value
| stats latest(rh) as rh | eval value=case( rh<35,"LOW HUMIDITY ALERT", rh>90,"HIGH HUMIDITY ALERT", true(),"NORMAL" ) | table value
| stats latest(temp_f) as temp latest(dewpoint_f) as dew | eval value=round(temp-dew,1) | fields value

| stats latest(temp_f) as "Temp Now (°F)" min(temp_f) as "Temp Low (°F)" max(temp_f) as "Temp High (°F)" latest(rh) as "RH Now (%)" min(rh) as "RH Low (%)" max(rh) as "RH High (%)" latest(vpd) as "VPD Now (kPa)" min(vpd) as "VPD Low (kPa)" max(vpd) as "VPD High (kPa)"
| timechart span=5m avg(temp_f) as Temperature
| timechart span=5m avg(rh) as Humidity
| timechart span=15m avg(vpd) as VPD
| timechart span=15m avg(dewpoint_f) as "Dew Point"

index=greenhouse sourcetype="greenhouse:log" earliest=-7d@d latest=now | rex field=_raw "-\s(?<temp_f>\d+(?:\.\d+)?)°F\s(?<rh>\d+(?:\.\d+)?)%" | eval temp_f=tonumber(temp_f) | timechart span=1d min(temp_f) as Low max(temp_f) as High avg(temp_f) as Avg

index=greenhouse sourcetype="greenhouse:log" earliest=-24h | rex field=_raw "-\s(?<temp_f>\d+(?:\.\d+)?)°F\s(?<rh>\d+(?:\.\d+)?)%" | eval temp_f=tonumber(temp_f), rh=tonumber(rh) | stats stdev(temp_f) as temp_sd stdev(rh) as rh_sd | eval value=round(100 - ((temp_sd*4) + (rh_sd*1.2)),1) | eval value=if(value<0,0,value) | fields value
| fields _time greenhouse_temp outdoor_temp
| fields _time greenhouse_rh outdoor_rh
| fields _time temp_delta
| fields _time rh_delta

index=greenhouse sourcetype="greenhouse:log" earliest=-2h | rex field=_raw "-\s(?<temp_f>\d+(?:\.\d+)?)°F\s(?<rh>\d+(?:\.\d+)?)%" | eval temp_f=tonumber(temp_f), rh=tonumber(rh) | eval temp_c=(temp_f-32)*5/9 | eval svp=0.6108*exp((17.27*temp_c)/(temp_c+237.3)) | eval current_vpd=(1-rh/100)*svp | stats latest(current_vpd) as current_vpd | eval current_vpd=round(current_vpd,2) | eval plant_list=split("Coffee|Green Tea|Jasmine|Cavendish Banana|Pink Lemonade Blueberry|Kale|Tobacco|Peppers|Corn|Black Pepper|Dahlias|Flowers","|") | mvexpand plant_list | rename plant_list as plant | eval low_ref=case( plant=="Coffee",0.8, plant=="Green Tea",0.6, plant=="Jasmine",0.8, plant=="Cavendish Banana",0.9, plant=="Pink Lemonade Blueberry",0.6, plant=="Kale",0.7, plant=="Tobacco",0.9, plant=="Peppers",0.8, plant=="Corn",0.8, plant=="Black Pepper",0.6, plant=="Dahlias",0.8, plant=="Flowers",0.8 ) | eval high_ref=case( plant=="Coffee",1.2, plant=="Green Tea",1.0, plant=="Jasmine",1.2, plant=="Cavendish Banana",1.5, plant=="Pink Lemonade Blueberry",1.1, plant=="Kale",1.0, plant=="Tobacco",1.2, plant=="Peppers",1.2, plant=="Corn",1.3, plant=="Black Pepper",0.9, plant=="Dahlias",1.2, plant=="Flowers",1.2 ) | eval in_range=if(current_vpd>=low_ref AND current_vpd<=high_ref,1,0) | stats sum(in_range) as value | fields value

index=greenhouse sourcetype="greenhouse:log" earliest=-2h | rex field=_raw "-\s(?<temp_f>\d+(?:\.\d+)?)°F\s(?<rh>\d+(?:\.\d+)?)%" | eval temp_f=tonumber(temp_f), rh=tonumber(rh) | stats latest(temp_f) as temp_f latest(rh) as rh | eval plant_list=split("Coffee|Green Tea|Jasmine|Cavendish Banana|Pink Lemonade Blueberry|Kale|Tobacco|Peppers|Corn|Black Pepper|Dahlias|Flowers","|") | mvexpand plant_list | rename plant_list as plant | eval temp_low=case( plant=="Coffee",60, plant=="Green Tea",55, plant=="Jasmine",60, plant=="Cavendish Banana",70, plant=="Pink Lemonade Blueberry",45, plant=="Kale",45, plant=="Tobacco",65, plant=="Peppers",65, plant=="Corn",60, plant=="Black Pepper",70, plant=="Dahlias",60, plant=="Flowers",55 ) | eval temp_high=case( plant=="Coffee",75, plant=="Green Tea",75, plant=="Jasmine",80, plant=="Cavendish Banana",95, plant=="Pink Lemonade Blueberry",80, plant=="Kale",75, plant=="Tobacco",85, plant=="Peppers",85, plant=="Corn",95, plant=="Black Pepper",90, plant=="Dahlias",80, plant=="Flowers",80 ) | eval rh_low=case( plant=="Coffee",50, plant=="Green Tea",40, plant=="Jasmine",50, plant=="Cavendish Banana",60, plant=="Pink Lemonade Blueberry",40, plant=="Kale",40, plant=="Tobacco",50, plant=="Peppers",50, plant=="Corn",40, plant=="Black Pepper",60, plant=="Dahlias",50, plant=="Flowers",45 ) | eval rh_high=case( plant=="Coffee",70, plant=="Green Tea",70, plant=="Jasmine",70, plant=="Cavendish Banana",90, plant=="Pink Lemonade Blueberry",65, plant=="Kale",70, plant=="Tobacco",75, plant=="Peppers",75, plant=="Corn",70, plant=="Black Pepper",85, plant=="Dahlias",70, plant=="Flowers",70 ) | eval in_range=if(temp_f>=temp_low AND temp_f<=temp_high AND rh>=rh_low AND rh<=rh_high,1,0) | stats sum(in_range) as value | fields value

index=greenhouse sourcetype="greenhouse:log" earliest=-2h | rex field=_raw "-\s(?<temp_f>\d+(?:\.\d+)?)°F\s(?<rh>\d+(?:\.\d+)?)%" | eval temp_f=tonumber(temp_f), rh=tonumber(rh) | stats latest(temp_f) as temp_f latest(rh) as rh | eval plant_list=split("Coffee|Green Tea|Jasmine|Cavendish Banana|Pink Lemonade Blueberry|Kale|Tobacco|Peppers|Corn|Black Pepper|Dahlias|Flowers","|") | mvexpand plant_list | rename plant_list as plant | eval temp_low=case( plant=="Coffee",60, plant=="Green Tea",55, plant=="Jasmine",60, plant=="Cavendish Banana",70, plant=="Pink Lemonade Blueberry",45, plant=="Kale",45, plant=="Tobacco",65, plant=="Peppers",65, plant=="Corn",60, plant=="Black Pepper",70, plant=="Dahlias",60, plant=="Flowers",55 ) | eval temp_high=case( plant=="Coffee",75, plant=="Green Tea",75, plant=="Jasmine",80, plant=="Cavendish Banana",95, plant=="Pink Lemonade Blueberry",80, plant=="Kale",75, plant=="Tobacco",85, plant=="Peppers",85, plant=="Corn",95, plant=="Black Pepper",90, plant=="Dahlias",80, plant=="Flowers",80 ) | eval rh_low=case( plant=="Coffee",50, plant=="Green Tea",40, plant=="Jasmine",50, plant=="Cavendish Banana",60, plant=="Pink Lemonade Blueberry",40, plant=="Kale",40, plant=="Tobacco",50, plant=="Peppers",50, plant=="Corn",40, plant=="Black Pepper",60, plant=="Dahlias",50, plant=="Flowers",45 ) | eval rh_high=case( plant=="Coffee",70, plant=="Green Tea",70, plant=="Jasmine",70, plant=="Cavendish Banana",90, plant=="Pink Lemonade Blueberry",65, plant=="Kale",70, plant=="Tobacco",75, plant=="Peppers",75, plant=="Corn",70, plant=="Black Pepper",85, plant=="Dahlias",70, plant=="Flowers",70 ) | eval temp_status=case( temp_f<temp_low,"🔵 Too Cold", temp_f>temp_high,"🔴 Too Hot", true(),"🟢 OK" ) | eval humidity_status=case( rh<rh_low,"🟡 Too Dry", rh>rh_high,"🔵 Too Humid", true(),"🟢 OK" ) | eval alarm=case( temp_f<temp_low,"TEMP LOW", temp_f>temp_high,"TEMP HIGH", rh<rh_low,"RH LOW", rh>rh_high,"RH HIGH", true(),"OK" ) | eval temp_range=temp_low." - ".temp_high." °F" | eval rh_range=rh_low." - ".rh_high." %" | table plant temp_range rh_range temp_f rh temp_status humidity_status alarm | rename plant as "Plant", temp_range as "Temp Range", rh_range as "Humidity Range", temp_f as "Current Temp", rh as "Current RH", temp_status as "Temp Status", humidity_status as "Humidity Status", alarm as "Alarm"

index=greenhouse sourcetype="greenhouse:log" earliest=-2h | rex field=_raw "-\s(?<temp_f>\d+(?:\.\d+)?)°F\s(?<rh>\d+(?:\.\d+)?)%" | eval temp_f=tonumber(temp_f), rh=tonumber(rh) | eval temp_c=(temp_f-32)*5/9 | eval svp=0.6108*exp((17.27*temp_c)/(temp_c+237.3)) | eval current_vpd=(1-rh/100)*svp | stats latest(current_vpd) as current_vpd | eval current_vpd=round(current_vpd,2) | eval plant_list=split("Coffee|Green Tea|Jasmine|Cavendish Banana|Pink Lemonade Blueberry|Kale|Tobacco|Peppers|Corn|Black Pepper|Dahlias|Flowers","|") | mvexpand plant_list | rename plant_list as plant | eval low_ref=case( plant=="Coffee",0.8, plant=="Green Tea",0.6, plant=="Jasmine",0.8, plant=="Cavendish Banana",0.9, plant=="Pink Lemonade Blueberry",0.6, plant=="Kale",0.7, plant=="Tobacco",0.9, plant=="Peppers",0.8, plant=="Corn",0.8, plant=="Black Pepper",0.6, plant=="Dahlias",0.8, plant=="Flowers",0.8 ) | eval high_ref=case( plant=="Coffee",1.2, plant=="Green Tea",1.0, plant=="Jasmine",1.2, plant=="Cavendish Banana",1.5, plant=="Pink Lemonade Blueberry",1.1, plant=="Kale",1.0, plant=="Tobacco",1.2, plant=="Peppers",1.2, plant=="Corn",1.3, plant=="Black Pepper",0.9, plant=="Dahlias",1.2, plant=="Flowers",1.2 ) | eval ref_range=tostring(low_ref)." - ".tostring(high_ref)." kPa" | eval status=case( current_vpd<low_ref,"🔵 Below Range", current_vpd>high_ref,"🔴 Above Range", true(),"🟢 In Range" ) | table plant ref_range current_vpd status | rename plant as "Plant", ref_range as "Reference Range", current_vpd as "Current VPD", status as "Status"

index=greenhouse sourcetype="greenhouse:log" earliest=-7d@d | rex field=_raw "-\s(?<temp_f>\d+(?:\.\d+)?)°F\s(?<rh>\d+(?:\.\d+)?)%" | eval temp_f=tonumber(temp_f), rh=tonumber(rh) | eval alert=case( temp_f>95,"High Temp", temp_f<45,"Low Temp", rh>90,"High Humidity", rh<30,"Low Humidity" ) | where isnotnull(alert) | eval temp_f=round(temp_f,1), rh=round(rh,1) | table _time temp_f rh alert | rename temp_f as "Temp (°F)", rh as "Humidity (%)", alert as "Alert" | sort - _time | head 25

index=greenhouse sourcetype="greenhouse:log" earliest=-14d@d | rex field=_raw "-\s(?<temp_f>\d+(?:\.\d+)?)°F\s(?<rh>\d+(?:\.\d+)?)%" | eval temp_f=tonumber(temp_f), rh=tonumber(rh) | eval alert=case( temp_f>95,"High Temp", temp_f<45,"Low Temp", rh>90,"High Humidity", rh<30,"Low Humidity" ) | where isnotnull(alert) | timechart span=1d count by alert useother=f

chart.title: Average Temperature by Hour of Day (7d)

search.query: index=greenhouse sourcetype="greenhouse:log" earliest=-7d@d | rex field=_raw "-\s(?<temp_f>\d+(?:\.\d+)?)°F\s(?<rh>\d+(?:\.\d+)?)%" | eval temp_f=tonumber(temp_f) | eval hour=strftime(_time,"%H") | stats avg(temp_f) as avg_temp by hour | sort hour

chart.title: Average Humidity by Hour of Day (7d)

search.query: index=greenhouse sourcetype="greenhouse:log" earliest=-7d@d | rex field=_raw "-\s(?<temp_f>\d+(?:\.\d+)?)°F\s(?<rh>\d+(?:\.\d+)?)%" | eval rh=tonumber(rh) | eval hour=strftime(_time,"%H") | stats avg(rh) as avg_rh by hour | sort hour
| stats latest(outdoor_temp_f) as value | eval value=round(value,1) | fields value
| stats latest(outdoor_feelslike_f) as value | eval value=round(value,1) | fields value
| stats latest(outdoor_humidity) as value | fields value
| stats latest(outdoor_wind_mph) as value | eval value=round(value,1) | fields value
| stats latest(outdoor_uv) as value | fields value
| stats latest(outdoor_pressure_in) as value | eval value=round(value,2) | fields value

index=greenhouse sourcetype="greenhouse:api:json" | stats latest(sunrise) as Sunrise latest(sunset) as Sunset latest(moonrise) as Moonrise latest(moonset) as Moonset latest(moon_illumination) as "Moon Illumination (%)"

index=greenhouse sourcetype="greenhouse:log" | stats latest(_time) as last_seen | eval source="Greenhouse Logger" | append [ search index=greenhouse sourcetype="greenhouse:api:json" | stats latest(_time) as last_seen | eval source="Weather API" ] | eval "Minutes Since Update"=round((now()-last_seen)/60,1) | eval "Last Seen"=strftime(last_seen,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | table source "Last Seen" "Minutes Since Update" | rename source as "Source"
